name: @metorial/pdf-apiio
description: Generate PDF documents dynamically from pre-defined templates. List and retrieve template metadata including variable definitions and data types. Populate templates with dynamic data including text, images, tables, barcodes, QR codes, and charts. Merge multiple templates into a single PDF document. Output PDFs as Slate attachments or temporary download URLs. Receive webhook notifications when PDFs are created.
skills: export PDF as attachment or URL
